quote: Give us the courage and fortitude to do what is in our power to do. May we work toward the greater good, being always mindful of how our actions, or inaction, affect others.
author: Rev. Randy Lewis
linkName: Prayer at the vigil for victims of gun violence
socialPost:
Let us find strength in our shared #humanity, acting with #compassion and #courage. Each choice we make can ripple through our #community—let's choose wisely and uplift one another.

https://blog.revrandylewis.com/prayer-at-the-vigil-for-victims-of-gun-violence/
